swahili.focus_explore_body: Weka masafa, ongeza vialama, na ulinganishe umbali.
swahili.focus_challenges_body: Fanya mazoezi ya kukadiria, kukamilisha, na kupata thamani.
swahili.focus_frac_body: Unganisha sehemu, desimali, asilimia, na vielelezo vya eneo.
swahili.focus_compare_body: Chunguza uhusiano wa ukubwa kati ya sehemu bila alama.
swahili.number_line_workspace: Eneo la kazi la mstari wa nambari
swahili.number_line_workspace_label: Eneo la Kazi la Mstari wa Nambari
swahili.focus_summary: Tumia mstari mmoja kupata thamani, kuonyesha maruko, na kuunganisha maumbo yanayolingana.
swahili.integer_lab_summary: Fungua maabara ndogo namba hasi zinapokuwa lengo.

hausa.focus_explore_body: Saita range, ƙara markers, kuma kwatanta nisa.
hausa.focus_challenges_body: Yi atisayen ƙiyasi, rounding, da nemo values.
hausa.focus_frac_body: Haɗa fractions, decimals, percents, da area models.
hausa.focus_compare_body: Gwada fraction size relationships ba tare da score ba.
hausa.focus_summary: Yi amfani da layi ɗaya don nemo values, nuna jumps, da haɗa equivalent forms.
hausa.integer_lab_summary: Buɗe mini lab lokacin da negative numbers su ne focus.

igbo.focus_explore_body: Tọọ range, tinye markers, tụnyere anya dị iche.
igbo.focus_challenges_body: Mee omume nke ịkọ, rounding, na ịchọta values.
igbo.focus_frac_body: Jikọọ fractions, decimals, percents, na area models.
igbo.focus_compare_body: Nwalee fraction size relationships na-enweghị score.
igbo.focus_summary: Jiri otu ahịrị chọta values, gosi jumps, na jikọọ equivalent forms.
igbo.integer_lab_summary: Mepee mini lab mgbe negative numbers bụ isi ihe.

yoruba.focus_explore_body: Ṣètò range, fi markers kún, kí o sì fi àwọn ọ̀nà jìnnà wéra.
yoruba.focus_challenges_body: Ṣe àdàṣe ìfojúsùn, rounding, àti wíwá values.
yoruba.focus_frac_body: So fractions, decimals, percents, àti area models pọ̀.
yoruba.focus_compare_body: Dán fraction size relationships wò láìsí score.
yoruba.focus_summary: Lo ìlà kan láti wá values, fi jumps hàn, kí o sì so equivalent forms pọ̀.
yoruba.integer_lab_summary: Ṣí mini lab nígbà tí negative numbers bá jẹ́ àfojúsùn.

somali.focus_explore_body: Dhig range-ka, ku dar markers, isbarbardhig masaafooyinka.
somali.focus_challenges_body: Ku celceli qiyaasidda, rounding, iyo helitaanka values.
somali.focus_frac_body: Isku xir fractions, decimals, percents, iyo area models.
somali.focus_compare_body: Tijaabi fraction size relationships iyada oo aan score lahayn.
somali.focus_summary: Isticmaal hal khad si aad u hesho values, u muujiso jumps, iyo u xirto equivalent forms.
somali.integer_lab_summary: Fur mini lab marka negative numbers ay focus yihiin.

lingala.focus_explore_body: Tia range, bakisá markers, mpe kokanisa bantaka.
lingala.focus_challenges_body: Salá exercice ya estimation, rounding, na koluka values.
lingala.focus_frac_body: Kangisá fractions, decimals, percents, na area models.
lingala.focus_compare_body: Meká fraction size relationships kozanga score.
lingala.focus_summary: Salelá molɔngɔ moko mpo na koluka values, kolakisa jumps, na kokangisa equivalent forms.
lingala.integer_lab_summary: Fungolá mini lab tango negative numbers ezali focus.

kinyarwanda.focus_explore_body: Shyiraho range, ongeraho markers, kandi ugereranye intera.
kinyarwanda.focus_challenges_body: Imenyereze kugereranya, rounding, no gushaka values.
kinyarwanda.focus_frac_body: Huza fractions, decimals, percents, na area models.
kinyarwanda.focus_compare_body: Gerageza fraction size relationships nta score.
kinyarwanda.focus_summary: Koresha umurongo umwe gushaka values, kwerekana jumps, no guhuza equivalent forms.
kinyarwanda.integer_lab_summary: Fungura mini lab igihe negative numbers ari zo focus.

kirundi.focus_explore_body: Shiraho range, ongerako markers, kandi ugereranye intera.
kirundi.focus_challenges_body: Menyereze kugereranya, rounding, no kurondera values.
kirundi.focus_frac_body: Huza fractions, decimals, percents, na area models.
kirundi.focus_compare_body: Gerageza fraction size relationships ata score.
kirundi.focus_summary: Koresha umurongo umwe kurondera values, kwereka jumps, no guhuza equivalent forms.
kirundi.integer_lab_summary: Fungura mini lab igihe negative numbers ari zo focus.

amharic.focus_explore_body: ክልሉን አዘጋጅ፣ ምልክቶችን ጨምር፣ እና ርቀቶችን አወዳድር።
amharic.focus_challenges_body: መገመትን፣ ማጠጋጋትን እና እሴቶችን ማግኘትን ተለማመድ።
amharic.focus_frac_body: ክፍልፋዮችን፣ ዲሲማሎችን፣ መቶኛዎችን እና የስፋት ሞዴሎችን አገናኝ።
amharic.focus_compare_body: ያለ ነጥብ በክፍልፋዮች መካከል ያለውን የመጠን ግንኙነት ፈትሽ።
amharic.focus_summary: እሴቶችን ለማግኘት፣ ዝላዮችን ለማሳየት እና እኩያ ቅርጾችን ለማገናኘት አንድ መስመር ተጠቀም።
amharic.integer_lab_summary: አሉታዊ ቁጥሮች ትኩረት ሲሆኑ ሚኒ ላብን ክፈት።

tigrinya.focus_explore_body: ደረት ኣቐምጥ፣ ምልክታት ወስኽ፣ ከምኡ'ውን ርሕቀታት ኣነጻጽር።
tigrinya.focus_frac_body: ክፍልፋያት፣ ዲሲማላት፣ ሚእታዊታትን ናይ ስፍሓት ሞዴላትን ኣራኽብ።
tigrinya.focus_compare_body: ብዘይ ነጥቢ ኣብ መንጎ ክፍልፋያት ዘሎ ናይ መጠን ዝምድና ፈትን።
tigrinya.focus_summary: ዋጋታት ንምርካብ፣ ዝላታት ንምርኣይን ማዕረ ቅርጽታት ንምትእስሳርን ሓደ መስመር ተጠቐም።
tigrinya.integer_lab_summary: ኣሉታዊ ቁጽርታት ኣተኵሮ ኣብ ዝኾኑሉ እዋን ንእሽቶ ላብ ክፈት።
